project_type: Next.js 14 App Router SaaS platform for restaurant management
build_system: npm with next build, no package installation possible (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network)
test_framework: No test framework configured - validation will be TypeScript compilation only
verification_instructions: Run TypeScript type-checking with npx tsc --noEmit to validate all changes compile correctly. Since network is INTEGRATIONS_ONLY, no npm install or next build is possible - use AST/syntax validation only.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network means no npm install possible. All node_modules already present.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install packages, cannot run next build (needs network for some operations). All changes must use existing dependencies only: next 14.2.15, react 18, next-intl, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, @prisma/client, next-auth, bcryptjs, stripe. Validation limited to TypeScript type-checking and manual code review.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Follow existing patterns: 'use client' for interactive pages, useTranslations for i18n, apiGet/apiPost from @/lib/api, cn() for class merging, Tailwind CSS for styling.
key_patterns: Components in src/components/{ui,layout,landing}/, pages use App Router conventions with [locale] param, API routes in src/app/api/, all pages use 'use client' with useState/useEffect for data fetching, Dashboard layout has fixed Sidebar + DashboardHeader, Master panel uses dark theme (bg-gray-900), i18n messages in messages/{en,pt}.json, utility classes defined in globals.css (.card, .input, .btn-primary etc.)
directory_structure: src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/ - owner dashboard pages, src/app/[locale]/(master)/ - admin panel (dark theme), src/app/[locale]/(public)/ - public menu+reserve, src/app/[locale]/(auth)/ - login/register, src/app/api/ - API routes, src/components/ui/ - reusable UI components, src/components/layout/ - Sidebar+Header, src/components/landing/ - homepage sections, src/lib/ - utilities, src/types/ - TypeScript interfaces, messages/ - i18n JSON files
